title: Smart-Exam-Evaluator
shortDescription: An AI-powered exam evaluation platform integrating generative intelligence with a personalized admin dashboard for automated and insightful assessments.
fullDescription: An AI-powered exam evaluation system that automates grading of handwritten multiple-choice answer sheets using Google Gemini, Flask, and OpenCV. It enables educators to set up tests, process scanned answer sheets, and generate detailed Excel-based performance reports. The platform supports real-time analysis, consolidated reporting, and an intuitive frontend dashboard for seamless test management.

title: FloraMart – Garland Ordering System
shortDescription: Built a full-stack wedding flower bulk ordering system using Java 25, Spring Boot, React, and MySQL with secure JWT authentication.
fullDescription: A comprehensive full-stack wedding flower bulk ordering system built with Java 25, Spring Boot, React, and MySQL. Features secure JWT authentication, role-based dashboards for admin, vendors, and customers, multi-occasion cart management, and UPI payment integration. Includes automated professional PDF invoice generation using iTextPDF and end-to-end order workflows from browsing to delivery tracking.

title: GradeSphere – College CGPA Management System
shortDescription: Developed a full-stack GPA/CGPA management system using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Firebase with secure role-based authentication.
fullDescription: A full-stack GPA/CGPA management system using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Firebase with secure role-based authentication for Admin, HOD, Staff, and Students. Implements real-time GPA/CGPA computation with department-wise subject and record management. Features a modern dark-themed glassmorphism UI with responsive layouts, interactive dashboards, and comprehensive academic tracking.
